sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_h3 (edge UInt64, origin UInt64);
UPDATE test_h3 SET origin = h3GetOriginIndexFromUnidirectionalEdge(edge) WHERE edge = 1248204388774707197;
SELECT edge, h3GetOriginIndexFromUnidirectionalEdge(edge) as origin FROM test_h3;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_h3 WHERE origin = h3GetOriginIndexFromUnidirectionalEdge(1248204388774707197);
